 Got the kinda look to make me freak
 That long ass hair with the tightest jeans
 My chemical romance on his teeth
 He look so sick like he was dyin'
 If I said he wasn't hot then I'd be lyin'
 So please, handsome, don't be coy

 He might not look like he gets bitches
 But honey, that chick was eleven and ten
